pageContext.name: Adam Smasher
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Dark Horse Comics are excited to present the Adam Smasher Figure!  Smasher is a towering cyborg, with little empathy or humanity left to be seen. After being blasted by an RPG, the Arasaka Corporation retrieved what was left of him and replaced what was missing with machinery. Now working as their muscle, he lives to repay them by killing any and all enemies of the corporation. This impressive figure stands above the rest at approximately 12 tall including his larger base to incorporate his massive size!  Don't miss your chance to add this cyborg figure to your collection!
